author: NETWORG
name: Power Platform: Workflow Activities
description: Creates WorkflowActivityBase.cs: abstract CodeActivity with sealed Execute() that initializes IWorkflowContext, two IOrganizationService instances (user + system context), ITracingService, then calls virtual Execute() for subclass implementation. Use for custom Dynamics 365 workflow steps.

PublisherName.description: Publisher name for the workflow activities project (used as author in PAC CLI)

Company.description: Company name for the workflow activities project metadata

SigningKeyFilePath.description: Path to the signing key file for assembly signing (optional)
